calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint And Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Ccp Section 425.16 Anti-Slapp
Off Calendar Oct-25-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs WALTER WORSHAM, and MARSHALL & CO. PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.'s Special Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint And Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To CCP Section 425.16 Anti-Slapp is moot, dismissal on file. Attorney's fees granted in the amount of $2,340. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
